violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of ice. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
Water was observed in blender bowls. After cleaning and sanitizing equipment and utensils must be air dried. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
Prep table located in the bar area was not in good repair, observed plastic peeling and exposed wood. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2022

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the ware washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2022

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2022
